programmes.show_description: The Goggleboxers watch Gladiators, The White Lotus, The Apprentice, Celebrity Bear Hunt, The Fear Clinic: Face Your Phobia, and Batch from Scratch: Cooking for Less.
Mum and daughter Maria and Charlotte visit the restaurant for the mother of all double dates. Academic Dan tries his 'intellectual' flirting technique with biologist Jemma.
Ted lost his beloved wife of 40 years three years ago. Now he's ready to return to the dating world. He meets Marian, who's been married four times but hasn't given up on love.
What do the Goggleboxers think of Celebrity Bear Hunt, The Apprentice, Go Back to Where You Came From, Michael McIntyre's Big Show and Boarders?
The Goggleboxers watch Gladiators, The White Lotus, The Apprentice, Celebrity Bear Hunt, The Fear Clinic: Face Your Phobia, and Batch from Scratch: Cooking for Less.
Giuseppi's: Gordon Ramsay visits a family-owned Italian in Michigan, run by a father and son who constantly clash. Can he get the restaurant - and the family - back on track?
Handlebar: Gordon Ramsay takes on a time warp at the Handlebar restaurant and lounge in Mount Sinai, New York, where the owners are stuck in the 80s with an unenthusiastic chef.
It's a family's worst nightmare when two children are taken. Meanwhile, Diane puts on a brave face for her family as she begins chemotherapy, but back at home, Tony is pushed to his limits.
(2019) Animated adventure featuring the voices of Jennifer Garner, Mila Kunis, John Oliver and Matthew Broderick. A girl's imaginary theme park comes to life when her mum goes to hospital.
Sabatiello's: Gordon Ramsay sets his sights on Sabatiello's, an Italian restaurant in Connecticut that's better known for its owner Sammy's tantrums than the food.
Trobiano's: Gordon Ramsay meets struggling executive chef Anthony Trobiano, who's sinking under half a million dollars of debt at his restaurant in Great Neck, New York.
Brand new series: As Friends and Family Week comes to an end, new information comes to light that threatens the future of several couples.
Brand new series: At the fourth dinner party, one bride is determined to avoid any drama. Alas, a groom has heard some rumours and needs to confront her...
(2021) Charming Disney Pixar animated adventure about a cute sea monster with wanderlust who takes human form on dry land. He's not allowed to go near the surface but it's oh so tempting...
The Last Temptation of Krust: Krusty swaps his old routines for edgier material and becomes the hottest comic in showbusiness. But then he faces a dilemma.
Dumbbell Indemnity: Moe meets a new woman (guest star Helen Hunt) but maxes out his credit card trying to impress her. So he reverts to insurance fraud. With help from Homer...
Lisa the Simpson: Lisa starts to suspect that she's not as clever as she used to be and worries that she'll end up a permanent underachiever like her father.
Pray Anything: Jealous of Flanders' lifestyle, Homer starts to pray for material possessions, but things get out of hand when he asks for a bigger house and gets the church.
The Trouble with Trillions: Homer and Mr Burns go on the run to Cuba with a trillion-dollar note that Mr Burns was meant to deliver to post-war Europe.
Girly Edition: Lisa is made anchor of a children's news programme, but it's Bart's charisma that gets noticed, and the siblings start a battle - both on and off-air.
Brand new series: Crabbiness creeps in as the celebs push on without a break, in a day of hustle and heat. But as the teams fly to Penang, it's the end of the line for one pair...
Bart the Cool Kid: Homer buys Bart a counterfeit pair of the hottest new sneakers on the planet, making Bart extremely popular - until everyone finds out they're fake.
Pretty Whittle Liar: It turns out that Brandine Spuckler is a secret genius - something that Cletus just can't accept.
(1988) Action-thriller with Bruce Willis and Alan Rickman. Can a New York cop free the hostages being held in a skyscraper by an arch villain? Yippee ki-yay... whoops, can't say that here.
On the 'Box this time: Casualty, Queer Eye, Below Deck Sailing Yacht, FUBAR, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, Big Beasts and BBC News (Phillip Schofield).
The Goggleboxers have been watching: Sitting on a Fortune, Casualty, Britain's Got Talent, MerPeople, James May: Oh Cook!, The Greatest Auction and Top of the Pops 1994.
Emmy-Lou from Brighton appears on the daring dating show for the third time, and forensics student Charlie strips as he seeks his ideal partner in crime.
On the 'Box this time: Casualty, Queer Eye, Below Deck Sailing Yacht, FUBAR, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, Big Beasts and BBC News (Phillip Schofield).
The Caribbean Carnival One: Laid-back Daniel fancies a Caribbean street parade for his nuptials, while Sabrina dreams of a more traditional event. Will their big day be carnage or carnival?
It's a family's worst nightmare when two children are taken. Meanwhile, Diane puts on a brave face for her family as she begins chemotherapy, but back at home, Tony is pushed to his limits.
Things come to a head in a face-off between two mothers. Meanwhile, Diane puts on a brave face for her family as she begins chemotherapy, but back at home, Tony is pushed to his limits...
Diane tries to create some normality for her family. Sparks fly for two villagers. And suspicion arises when a resident disappears.
A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.
La Galleria 33 (Part 2/2): The saga of Boston eatery La Galleria 33 comes to a dramatic conclusion as Gordon Ramsay gives restaurant owners and sisters Rita and Lisa an ultimatum.
Geoff's New Hat: When Geoff decides to change his look, Barry worries that they're growing apart. Bev's frustrated when Murray refuses to spend time with her.
Quaker Warden: Worried that her children are slipping away, Beverly takes on new responsibilities at William Penn. Murray struggles to work with Formica Mike.
Our Children, Ourselves: Claire and Phil want Alex to relax about her studies, but then question their own intellectual drives. And Gloria tries to befriend another nice couple.
Caught in the Act: The kids catch Phil and Claire in a compromising position when they surprise them with breakfast in bed on their anniversary.
Brand new series: At the fourth dinner party, one bride is determined to avoid any drama. Alas, a groom has heard some rumours and needs to confront her...
TV presenter Hayley is love-shy when it comes to dating. Luca seeks 'a nice girl' to please his dad. Boarding school matron Sarah wants a non-conformist guy who's up for some fun.
Mama Maria's: Gordon Ramsay visits Mama Maria's, a failing restaurant in Brooklyn, New York, where owner John is overwhelmed by running a business that's become stuck in the past.
The Saga of Carl: Homer, Moe, Lenny and Carl win the lottery, but Carl runs off to Iceland with the winnings.
Dangers on a Train: While she's browsing for wedding anniversary cakes, Marge stumbles across a website for married people who want to have affairs.
Good Cop Bad Dog: Phil and Claire swap parenting roles for the day - Claire will be the fun-loving good cop and Phil the disciplinarian bad cop.
See You Next Fall: The family gather at Jay's before heading to Alex's middle school graduation ceremony. While they're there, Jay tries to hide a Botox mishap from everyone.
Brand new series: At the fourth dinner party, one bride is determined to avoid any drama. Alas, a groom has heard some rumours and needs to confront her...
Fourteen all-stars from previous cycles re-enter Tyra Banks' iconic competition for a second chance to take the title. First up, they're judged by rap star Nicki Minaj.
The Girl Code: Marge posts a photo on social media that gets Homer fired, so he returns to his old job as a dish-washer in a Greek restaurant. Lisa creates an app.
Teenage Mutant Milk-Caused Hurdles: Bart is smitten with his new teacher and tries to impress her. Homer buys a new type of milk that has a strange effect on Bart and Lisa.
As Frankie prepares to leave the village, the Keanes get ready to surprise their estranged family by moving to Hollyoaks. But in a devastating twist of fate, things spiral out of control...
...Australia - Brand new series: The fourth Commitment Ceremony has arrived. And while some couples resolve to move forward, the ceremony descends into chaos for one pair.
Brand new series: A getaway with new girl Georgia isn't as romantic as Philip had hoped... Zeyno reveals a secret. Jazz tries to move on. And Alice and Sam welcome baby Marmaduke!
This time on the 'Box: Eurovision Song Contest, Bridgerton, Love Triangle Australia, Double the Money, Marcus Wareing Simply Provence and BBC News (northern lights).
